case_title: BROECH CORPORATION D/B/A/ THE ULTIMATE SOFTWARE VS. BLACKFOOT, INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROECH CORPORATION D/B/A/ THE ULTIMATE SOFTWARE CONSULTANTS AS TO DEFENDANT BLACKFOOT, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROECH CORPORATION D/B/A/ THE ULTIMATE SOFTWARE CONSULTANTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLACKFOOT, INC. $134,868.55 PRINCIPAL, $1,064.00 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $136,267.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX ) ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
